description.content: Chaos engineering for AppSec — fault injection + response grading. No competitor has this.
19-phase deterministic scanner proving exploitability — the crown jewel. V5.
CVE-specific micro penetration tests — automated exploit verification.
Breach & Attack Simulation — MITRE ATT&CK-mapped campaigns.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Payment Service SQL Injection",
  "attack_type": "web_application",
  "mitre_technique": "T1190",
  "description": "Simulated SQL injection attack against payment endpoints",
  "targets": ["payment-api"]
}

description.content: Full MPTE orchestration — threat intel, business impact, simulation, remediation in one flow.
Multi-LLM decision making with 85% consensus threshold — GPT-4 + Claude + Gemini.
AI agent analysis capabilities — vulnerability analysis, threat intel, prioritization.

## Validate — "Is it actually exploitable?"

Covers: MPTE Console, Attack Simulation, FAIL Engine, Playbooks, Reachability

### Personas Served
- **Jason Park** (Pentest Lead) — MPTE scanning, exploit verification
- **Raj Patel** (DevSecOps Lead) — FAIL scoring, validation triage
- **Carlos Mendez** (Red Team Lead) — Attack simulation campaigns
- **Lisa Wang** (Security Architect) — Attack path analysis

### Endpoints: 90+ covering MPTE, micro-pentest, attack simulation, FAIL engine, decisions, LLM consensus

### Vision Pillars: V3 (Decision Intelligence), V4 (Multi-LLM), V5 (MPTE Verification), V10 (CTEM)
